## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run check-types`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run changeset:status -- --since=origin/main` (or equivalent CI check)

## Release Notes

- [ ] Changeset added (package-impacting changes)
- [ ] Empty changeset added (non-release change, if required by policy)
- [ ] No changeset needed (explain):

## Risk and Rollback

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollback plan:
